content.text:
[cron:71585983-eab9-4557-924c-277a29a73768 每日02:00 OpenClaw会话索引清理] 执行 OpenClaw 会话索引夜间清理。要求：1) 先检查 coding-agent 当前是否有活跃子代理；保留仍在执行的 subagent session key，不要误删。2) 对 coding-agent 与 main 运行 scripts/openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py 清理 cron-run 与已结束 subagent；如果 coding-agent 有活跃子代理，用 --keep-key 逐个保留。3) 对 main 再执行一次 --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply。4) 只做清理，不发用户可见消息；完成后在 cron run 日志里简短记录 removed keys / backup path。
Current time: Thursday, April 16th, 2026 - 2:00 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-15 18:00 UTC

content.thinking: Let me check for active subagents first, then run the cleanup scripts.
No active subagents. Let me check if there's an openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py script somewhere, or if it needs to be found.
Found the script. Now let me check what arguments it accepts.

content.text:
usage: openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py [-h] --agents AGENTS [AGENTS ...]
                                         [--root ROOT]
                                         --prune {cron-base,cron-run,subagent} [{cron-base,cron-run,subagent} ...]
                                         [--older-than-hours OLDER_THAN_HOURS]
                                         [--keep-key KEEP_KEY] [--apply]

Prune OpenClaw session index entries (cron run / subagent) with backups.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --agents AGENTS [AGENTS ...]
                        Agent ids to clean, e.g. coding-agent main
  --root ROOT           OpenClaw agents root (default: ~/.openclaw/agents)
  --prune {cron-base,cron-run,subagent} [{cron-base,cron-run,subagent} ...]
                        Entry classes to prune from sessions.json
  --older-than-hours OLDER_THAN_HOURS
                        Required with cron-base: only prune cron base sessions
                        older than N hours.
  --keep-key KEEP_KEY   Session key to keep even if it matches a prune class.
                        Repeatable.
  --apply               Write changes. Default is dry-run.

details.aggregated:
usage: openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py [-h] --agents AGENTS [AGENTS ...]
                                         [--root ROOT]
                                         --prune {cron-base,cron-run,subagent} [{cron-base,cron-run,subagent} ...]
                                         [--older-than-hours OLDER_THAN_HOURS]
                                         [--keep-key KEEP_KEY] [--apply]

Prune OpenClaw session index entries (cron run / subagent) with backups.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --agents AGENTS [AGENTS ...]
                        Agent ids to clean, e.g. coding-agent main
  --root ROOT           OpenClaw agents root (default: ~/.openclaw/agents)
  --prune {cron-base,cron-run,subagent} [{cron-base,cron-run,subagent} ...]
                        Entry classes to prune from sessions.json
  --older-than-hours OLDER_THAN_HOURS
                        Required with cron-base: only prune cron base sessions
                        older than N hours.
  --keep-key KEEP_KEY   Session key to keep even if it matches a prune class.
                        Repeatable.
  --apply               Write changes. Default is dry-run.

1. No active subagents - no --keep-key needed

3. Run for main with --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply
